labor.s: 11 OSHA severe-injury reports in past 2y (3 amputations); 63 since 2015.

health.s: 16 CPSC recalls (2 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the legs of the plush toy can detach from the body allowing the release of small.

topHazards.label: The legs of the plush toy can detach from the body allowing the release of small beads that are on the legs, posing a choking hazard to young children.
The compression strap that surrounds the outside of the pool legs may create a foothold, allowing a child access to the pool, posing a drowning risk.
The stools can break during use, posing fall and injury hazards.
The battery cover can detach and expose the small coin cell batteries, posing choking and ingestion hazards to young children.
The fin of the whale and the head of the octopus can detach from the pacifier holder, posing a choking hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Hobby Lobby Recalls Giraffe and Llama Plush Toys with Clips Due to Choking Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves a Giraffe Plush Toy with clip and a Llama Plush Toy with clip. The Giraffe with clip has a yellow body with a yellow claw clip. The legs of the giraffe are orange and blue with various colored paws. The ears are black and white animal print. The Giraffe measures about nine inches long. The Giraffe…
hazards: The legs of the plush toy can detach from the body allowing the release of small beads that are on the legs, posing a choking hazard to young children.
injuries: The firm has received one report of the leg detaching from the body of the plush toy, allowing the small beads to detach from the leg. No injuries have been reported.
products: Giraffe Plush Toy with clip, Llama Plush Toy with clip

sampleRecalls.title: Hobby Lobby Recalls Giraffe and Llama Plush Toys with Clips Due to Drowning Hazard; Manufactured by Starmatrix Group Drowning Hazard; Manufactured by Starmatrix Group
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves all Sunneday and Blue Bay brand above-ground pools 48 inches and taller. Model information and the Sunneday or Blue Bay logo are printed on the liner on the outside of the pool. Pool models subject to this recall include: Model Description UPC Code 70018 Sunneday Oasis Cottage 18'x52" 850022858529…
hazards: The compression strap that surrounds the outside of the pool legs may create a foothold, allowing a child access to the pool, posing a drowning risk.
products: Sunneday and Blue Bay brand 48-inch and taller above-ground pools

sampleRecalls.title: Hobby Lobby Recalls White Wood Stools Due to Fall and Injury Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the White Wood Stool which has a wooden brown curved seat, with squared-off legs that are painted white with a touch of distressing. The legs have supportive cross beams at the bottom of the stool. The stool is about 24 inches tall and 15 inches wide.
hazards: The stools can break during use, posing fall and injury hazards.
injuries: Hobby Lobby has received seven reports of the stool breaking while in use, including six incidents resulting in minor injuries.

sampleRecalls.title: Hobby Lobby Recalls Easter and July 4th Light-Up Spinner Toys Due to Choking and Ingestion Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves children's battery-powered, light-up spinner toys sold in two themes: Easter and July 4th. The Easter-themed toys were sold in blue with a pink bunny on the dome and yellow with a yellow and orange chicken on the dome. The July 4th spinners are red with white stars painted on the blue dome. "Hobby…
hazards: The battery cover can detach and expose the small coin cell batteries, posing choking and ingestion hazards to young children.
injuries: Hobby Lobby has received one report of a 14-month-old child who ingested the battery. An x-ray was conducted and the battery passed through.
products: Easter and July 4th-themed Light-Up Spinner Toys

sampleRecalls.title: Hobby Lobby Recalls Infant Pacifier Holders Due to Choking Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Little Wishes Summer Plush Pacifier Holder, including the Blue Whale, item number 5202601, and the Pink Octopus, item number 5725213. The pacifier holders are made of a plush fabric, stuffed with fiber, measure approximately 4.5 inches by 2 inches and have a 10-inch ribbon attached to the body. Th…
hazards: The fin of the whale and the head of the octopus can detach from the pacifier holder, posing a choking hazard.
injuries: Hobby Lobby has received one report of the whale fin detaching from the pacifier holder. No injuries have been reported.
